project_type: Native macOS desktop app built with SwiftUI (Swift 6.0+, macOS 14+)
build_system: Swift Package Manager (Package.swift at root). Single executable target KiroKantoku with test target KiroKantokuTests.
verification_instructions: 1. Run swift build and confirm no errors. 2. Run swift test and confirm all tests pass (258+ tests).
setup_instructions: Swift 6.2.1 is pre-installed. Run swift build to resolve SPM dependencies and build.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Swift 6.2.1 available. This is a macOS app but the build/test sandbox is Linux - some macOS-specific APIs (NSPasteboard, NSImage, NSOpenPanel) will compile behind #if os(macOS) guards but won't execute at test time. Unit tests test model/service logic, not UI views.
contribution_requirements: Open an issue first to discuss changes. MIT License.
key_patterns: All view files are wrapped in #if os(macOS). The ChatInputView manages image attachments as [Data]. The pickImages() method uses NSOpenPanel with UTType filtering (png, jpeg, gif, webP). NSPasteboard is already used in DebugLogView for copy-to-clipboard. DesignConstants enum centralizes UI constants. The TextEditor is the main input component with keyboard handling via .onKeyPress modifiers.
directory_structure: Sources/KiroKantoku/ contains App/, Models/, Services/, Views/. Views/ has Agent/ (chat UI), Code/ (diff viewer), Components/ (shared), Dashboard/, Task/, Sidebar/, Session/, Settings/, Workspace/, Onboarding/. Tests/KiroKantokuTests/ has XCTest files.
